evals.prompt: I just cloned this repo for the workshop. Can you set everything up so I can start coding?
evals.expected_output: Installs deps, prompts for API key, configures .env, starts both services, shows URLs

evals.prompt: hey im at the workshop and nothing is working, how do i get this running?
evals.expected_output: Guides through full setup in friendly tone, installs deps, configures env, starts services

evals.prompt: I already ran npm install but the app won't start, something about an API key?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes partial setup, focuses on .env config and starting services rather than reinstalling
